battleTraits.name: Scions of the Storm
battleTraits.timing: Your Movement Phase (from 3rd battle round onwards)
battleTraits.effect: Set up Yndrasta or your Annihilators unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Drive Them Back
battleTraits.effect: Pick any number of friendly units contesting an objective and in combat. Each can make a pile-in move. For each, pick an enemy within 1" and roll a dice. On 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage.

battleTraits.name: Defend to the Last
battleTraits.effect: Friendly units have WARD (6+) while contesting an objective you control.

enhancements.name: The Prime Huntress
enhancements.effect: The Damage characteristic of Thengavar (Yndrasta's spear) is 2D6 for attacks that target a MONSTER.

enhancements.name: Strike with the Tempest's Rage
enhancements.effect: Your general has STRIKE-FIRST if they charged in the same turn.

enhancements.name: Dazzling Radiance
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
enhancements.effect: Pick your general if they were set up this phase. Return 1 slain model to each friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general.

enhancements.name: Hawk of the Celestial Skies
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: Until end of phase, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by friendly units wholly within 12" of your general.

abilities.name: Champion of Sigmar
abilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
abilities.effect: This unit has WARD (5+) this phase.

abilities.name: Banner of the Reforged
abilities.effect: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12". Heal (D3) the target. Add 3 to its control score until your next turn.

abilities.name: Force of a Falling Star
abilities.effect: If this unit charged this phase and unmodified charge roll was 8+, pick an enemy unit within 1". The target has STRIKE-LAST this turn.

abilities.name: Lightning Strikes
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit's Celestial Greatswords for attacks that target an enemy unit that has 5 or more models.

abilities.name: Azyr Unleashed
abilities.effect: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" and roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.
